title: Sombrius's Weaponry Redux
description: A mod that adds a ton of weapons for more variety
body:
Mortius' Weaponry Redux is a remake of the mod '' Mortius' Weaponry ''. It adds new and unique weapons to bring variety to your game and better represent your playstyle. This mod, unlike its predecessor, focuses more on mod compatibility and simplicity, while fixing a lot of previous issues and polishing weapons and textures. For a better experience, the Better Combat mod is highly recommended.

[Join the discord server! :)](https://discord.gg/ddBuyXGSQp)

[How to add weapons to the mod](https://github.com/TroupeMaster/Sombrius-s-Weaponry-Redux/wiki/How-to-add-weapons-to-the-mod)

---
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

To craft the weapons in this mod, handles (for smaller weapons) or poles (for polearms) need to be made.
![Handle recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9c5928af69db54fb98e8aa5413043983753042cb.png)
![Pole recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1932d778827f8385641ead5dc95f784f41bafd67.png)

</details>

Here are the weapons currently in the mod that the player can craft:


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**Gladius**

![Gladius recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/368b8d67c86f10b1b424c8ffb88e76028d143eef.png)

The gladius is a shortsword with a fast swing speed. If the user has a shield in the off-hand, the shield will have a chance to block incoming attacks without being used.

**Dagger**

![Dagger recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ce7336656390a7e5fa17124b0f5e58decff1af0c.png)

The dagger is a very short weapon. It compensates by being extremely fast, but also deadly. If the user attacks a foe while not being seen, the dagger will deal double the damage.

**Rapier**

![Rapier recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/73ef77144fe4339341f0c090fee6284b24c4a0d4.png)

The rapier is a nimble narrow sword. 45% of its damage pierces armor.

**Khopesh**

![Khopesh recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/10a33107ba0701f8e36a5a45ba504de395a0eef8.png)

The khopesh is a sword-axe hybrid. It will disable shields on hit like axes while maintaining the agility of a sword.

**Halberd**

![Halberd recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/15da9322a8f21f5178257fee8e51b43541ca18d3.png)

The halberd is a pole axe that is capable of dealing huge amounts of damage. Its range makes it deadly but it is too heavy to be held with only one hand.

**Warhammer**

![Warhammer recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d001f2f76bbd9eece643ccf53371cf5c27155682.png)

The warhammer is the perfect tool for those who want to smash skulls, but also armors. It will deal more damage the more armor points the foe has.

**Sickle**

![Sickle recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2a645efb5151325bbc09e9ec047401bca16a6cc4.png)

The sickle is a fast small weapon that deals more damage the more hits dealt.

**Mace**

![Mace recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4ac6d9350236ce381a590fcc0bdda647bf93af81.png)

The mace is a devastating weapon that completely decimates any armor or shield in its path. When the foe is at full health, this weapon will deal more damage.

**Scythe**

![Scythe recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5f3f119f79e6506fe14bdb40188afa0db2e1a878.png)

The scythe is a grim weapon that deals more damage if the foe is wearing no helmets. Its curved blade is perfect for dealing with huge crowds, but its long handle will take two hands to wield.

**Saber**

![Saber recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/403d0332677aa71b8053b4aa206c688ce2e090b5.png)

The saber will become faster the more the user attacks.

**Battle Axe**

![Battle Axe recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e8c3309647ec11f651fdca8a146d917c213e6472.png)

This weapon, perfect for cleaving through flesh and bones, will stop any regeneration from occurring on hit.

**Pike**

![Pike recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8a7b564f7d788d91aa7bacf87a854ff0925ea9ef.png)

Its exaggerated length is perfect for keeping foes at a safe distance, but its long handle will require two hands to be held.

**Lance**

![Lance recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/111c8c6e46179a4fd88d10188081179b6aeb4bd7.png)

The lance is the weapon of choice for cavalry as it deals more damage if the user is riding a mount such as a horse.

**Messer**

![Messer recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6d2ce333557c1e8568e77ed34495b829f56c43dc.png)

This long knife will grant its user a short period upon being hit where they can regain some of their lost health.

**Katana**

![Katana recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0fed8de5666d722bb2abe38a855cf7b83672ae10.png)

The katana is perfect for dealing sweeping attacks while still retaining its speed. This weapon needs two hands to be effective.

**Greatsword**

![Greatsword recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4033dbdd1b8c9aad9f2f11d90808071de0724c39.png)

The greatsword, with its long blade, has a longer reach than regular swords and can deal more devastating sweeping attacks. Because of its immense weight, this weapon requires two hands to be held.

**Glaive**

![Glaive recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fe6a01c1b79832eeb31cca6841540e70f901bd30.png)

The glaive is perfect for those wanting to have more reach while still retaining the sweeping attacks of a sword. Its curved blade will cut through crowds with ease, but it requires two hands to be used.

**Executioner Sword**

![Executioner Sword recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aa213ad8d384c7604481ca0a2a7bf740827a223c.png)

This grim sword used for executions will deal double damage if the foe is below half health. Its huge blade requires two hands to be used.

**Twin Blade**

![Twin Blade recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d5d3b9613ab3e982adecb52980e13a9b9366b197.png)

The twin blade is the perfect weapon for dealing with foes all around you. Its two opposite blades will attack everything around the user, but its powerful capabilities require two hands to be used.

**Spear**

![Spear recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b7a3cff9d81fc5d3ac4e82ec9828f6d7f57d439c.png)

The spear is perfect for attacking from a safe distance while being able to handle it with one hand, freeing a hand to hold something like a shield for more protection.

**Flail**

![Flail recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6e4eb818d85f26d86e0cb697b536105d1ebf72e4.png)

The flail, with its chain connecting to a ball, is perfect to hit an opponent around a shield from a safe distance.

**Flintlock Guns :**

**Flintlock Pistol**

![A flintlock pistol](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/13b8bcda4c6b7fe10856efb3f4e6dd0de2cabd66.png)

A small pistol which deals moderate damage but can be reloaded decently fast.

**Musket**

![A musket](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a8e0b062421c9e6e332cb81617b22269b99bac80.png)

A long rifle that requires two hands to wield. It can shoot to long distances and packs quite the punch.

**Blunderbuss**

![A blunderbuss](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/12dca70213df9fddebae29ec94a0eb2cbe209734.png)

Although it has poor range and needs two hands to wield, it compensates by dealing heavy knockback and shoots 3 balls of your choosing.

</details>
